emails.subject: Deerfield landowner!!!!!
emails.body: Deerfield landowner!!!!! Paul Jankowsky just called and wanted to talk to the attorney in charge of the Deerfield project. He sounded a tad irate.

emails.subject: RE: Deerfield landowner!!!!!
emails.body: RE: Deerfield landowner!!!!! I am familiar with the Mancini option, but I don't know who this person might be. Any ideas? To: Mann, Kay; Jacoby, Ben

emails.subject: RE: Deerfield landowner!!!!!
emails.body: Ben has given this to Raimund to deal with.
